queries.question: provide the communication channel that is common to all customer service representatives
queries.sql: SELECT Channels.channel_value  from Customer_Service_Representatives_Channels join Channels on Customer_Service_Representatives_Channels.channel_id = Channels.channel_id join Customer_Service_Representatives on Customer_Service_Representatives_Channels.representative_id = Customer_Service_Representatives.id   GROUP BY Customer_Service_Representatives_Channels.channel_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Customer_Service_Representatives_Channels.representative_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Customer_Service_Representatives)

queries.question: which communication channels are assigned to each customer service representative?
queries.sql: select customer_service_representatives.email , channels.channel_value from Customer_Service_Representatives_Channels join Channels on Customer_Service_Representatives_Channels.channel_id = Channels.channel_id join Customer_Service_Representatives on Customer_Service_Representatives_Channels.representative_id = Customer_Service_Representatives.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?email ?channel_value WHERE {
  ?customer_service_representatives_channels a :Customer_Service_Representatives_Channels .
  ?channels a :Channels .
  ?customer_service_representatives_channels p:hasChannels ?channels .
  ?customer_service_representatives a :Customer_Service_Representatives .
  ?customer_service_representatives_channels p:hasCustomer_Service_Representatives ?customer_service_representatives .
  ?customer_service_representatives p:email ?email .
  ?channels p:channel_value ?channel_value .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: which communication channels are assigned to each customer service representative?
